Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Monomorphisms into constant partial setoids

 In this file, we study monomorphisms into constant partial setoids. Let us be more precise
 on what this entails. Suppose that we have a first-order hyperdoctrine `H`, and let `C`
 be the category of types of `H`. We write `Form` for the displayed category over `C` whose
 objects over `Γ` are formulas in context `Γ`. The hyperdoctrine `H` gives rise to a category
 of partial setoids, which we denote by `PartialSetoid`. We already showed that we have a
 functor, call it `F`, from the category `C` of types to `PartialSetoid`. It sends every type
 to the partial setoid whose partial equivalence relation is given by the equality formula
 in the hyperdoctrine `H`. In this file, we construct a displayed functor over `F` from `Form`
 to the displayed category of monomorphisms in `PartialSetoid`. Concretely, this means that
 every formula in `H` gives rise to a monomorphism into a constant object in the category of
 partial setoids. We also show that this displayed functor is both split essentially surjective
 and fully faithful. Intuitively, this means that monomorphisms into a constant object are the
 same as formulas on it.

 This statement is similar to Lemma 3.3 in "Tripos Theory in Retrospect" by Andrew Pitts.
 The difference is that we are looking at constant objects, i.e., partial setoids whose
 partial equivalence relation is given by equality. For this reason, the extra requirements
 given in Formulas (7) and (8) become vacuous, and as a result, subobjects of `X` are the
 same as formulas on `X`.

 There is an important consequence of this construction. Since the displayed functor from
 formulas in `H` to monomorphisms in the category of partial setoids is split essentially
 surjective and fully faithful, it gives rise to an equivalence of fiber categories. As such,
 it preserves all structure, and it is a morphism of first-order hyperdoctrines. This allows
 us to reason about constant objects in the category of partial objects by using the language
 of the first-order hyperdoctrine.

 References
 - "Tripos Theory in Retrospect" by Andrew Pitts

 Content
 1. Formulas to monomorphisms
 1.1. The partial setoid
 1.2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation
 1.3. The inclusion
 1.4. The proof that it is monic
 2. Proofs to commuting triangles
 2.1. The morphism from a proof
 2.2. Proof of commutativity
 3. The displayed functor from formulas to monomorphisms
 4. The displayed functor is fully faithful
 5. The displayed functor is split essentially surjective
 6. Identifying terms using monomorphisms

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERConstantObjects.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section FormulaFunctor.
  Context (H : first_order_hyperdoctrine).

  (** * 1. Formulas to monomorphisms *)

  (** * 1.1. The partial setoid *)
  Definition formula_to_per_form
             {A : ty H}
             (φ : form A)
    : form (A ×h A)
    := let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) in
       let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)) in
       x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [ x₁ ].

  Arguments formula_to_per_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_axioms (formula_to_per_form φ)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_axioms (formula_to_per_form φ)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_trans_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
           ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
          ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
             ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
             ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
            ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
            ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
            ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
            ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
            ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
            ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤ ⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₁ ∧ φ [x₂]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₁ ∧ φ [x₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))] ∧ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
⊢ x₂ ≡ x₁ ∧ φ [x₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A

x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₁ ∧ φ [x₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_trans_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
               ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
               ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                 ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
                ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                   ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
                  [⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))),
                   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                   ⟩])))

A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
              ≡ π₂
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
              ∧ φ

                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
                ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))

                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))])))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
              ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁])))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
  ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂]
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ φ [x₁]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ≡ ?t₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ ?t₂ ≡ x₃

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
 exact x₂.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃

A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂ ≡ x₃ ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ φ [x₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ φ [x₁]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
φ [x₁] ⊢ φ [x₁]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per A

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per A

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
form (A ×h A)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_axioms ?e

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
form (A ×h A)
 exact (formula_to_per_form φ).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per_axioms (formula_to_per_form φ)
 exact (formula_to_per_axioms φ).
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid H

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid H

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
ty H
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per ?X

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
ty H
 exact A.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
per A
 exact (formula_to_per φ).
  Defined.

  (** * 1.2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))]) [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
 exact p.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]
 exact q.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))]) [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂ ⊢ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))]) [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [t₁]

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ φ [t₂]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ φ [t₂]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂ ⊢ φ [t₂]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))]) [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [t₂]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [t₂]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
tm Γ A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ ?t₁ ≡ t₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [?t₁]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
tm Γ A
 exact t₁.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ⊢ t₁ ≡ t₂

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ≡ t₂ ∧ φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [t₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
φ [t₁] ⊢ φ [t₁]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 1.3. The inclusion *)
  Definition formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form
             {A : ty H}
             (φ : form A)
    : form (formula_to_partial_setoid φ ×h eq_partial_setoid A)
    := let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) in
       let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)) in
       x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [ x₁ ].

  Arguments formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form {A} φ /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form φ)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
           ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤ ⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₁ ~ x₁))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₁ ~ x₁

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A

[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))] ∧ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₁

partial_setoid_mor_eq_defined_law

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                 ×h A))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                              ×h A))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                             ×h A))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                    ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                       ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                       ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h A)
                                          ×h A) ×h A)
                                        ×h A))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                ×h A))) ⟩]
                      ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                         ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                         ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)
                                        ×h A) ×h A)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                               ×h A)) ⟩]))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                 ×h A))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                              ×h A))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                             ×h A))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                    ⇒ π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)
                                      ×h A) ×h A)))))
                      ≡ π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                 ×h A)))
                      ∧ φ
                        [π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h A)
                                          ×h A) ×h A)
                                        ×h A)))))]
                      ⇒ π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)
                                     ×h A) ×h A))))
                        ≡ π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                ×h A))
                        ∧ φ
                          [π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)
                                        ×h A) ×h A))))]))))

A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A

                    (π₁

                                 ×h A)))

                                          ×h A) ×h A)
                                        ×h A)))))]
                      ⇒ π₂
                          (π₁

                                     ×h A) ×h A))))

                                        ×h A) ×h A))))]))))

φ: form A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A

                      ≡ π₂

                                ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)
                                 ×h A)))

                      ⇒ π₂

                                   ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)
                                     ×h A) ×h A))))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₄:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ x₃ ~ x₄
                    ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁]
                      ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₄ ∧ φ [x₂]))))

x₄:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ x₃ ~ x₄ ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ≡ x₄ ∧ φ [x₂]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form φ)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
               ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
               ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                 ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
                 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
              ≡ π₂
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
              ∧ φ
                [π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
                ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                ∧ φ
                  [π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A

⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁

              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
                ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                ∧ φ
                  [π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
              ≡ π₂
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
              ∧ φ
                [π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
                ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                ∧ φ
                  [π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
              ≡ π₂
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))
              ∧ φ
                [π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
                ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
                ∧ φ
                  [π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]
              ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ~ x₃)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ~ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ~ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⇒ x₂ ~ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ~ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) (eq_partial_setoid A)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ≡ ?t₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ ?t₂ ≡ x₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) (eq_partial_setoid A)
 exact x₁.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₂ ≡ x₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A

x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
(x₁ ≡ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₃ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) A
x₁ ≡ x₃ ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₃

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form φ)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
      ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))
             ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
             ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
      ⇒ ∃h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
            ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
            ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
  ⇒ ∃h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
        ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
        ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ ∃h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
      ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ ∃h (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
      ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h A), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
   ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h A), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ x ≡ x ∧ φ [x]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ x ≡ x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ φ [x]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ x ≡ x
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ x ~ x

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)): tm (𝟙 ×h A) A
x ~ x ⊢ φ [x]
 exact (prop_from_formula_to_partial_setoid φ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
  (eq_partial_setoid A)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
  (eq_partial_setoid A)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
form
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ ×h eq_partial_setoid A)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
form
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ ×h eq_partial_setoid A)
 exact (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form φ).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form φ)
 exact (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_laws φ).
  Defined.

  (** * 1.4. The proof that it is monic *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁ ⊢ ψ₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁ ⊢ ψ₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
     (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)),
   π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
(partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
   (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ))
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)),
 π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
     (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)),
   π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ (∃h (ψ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
          ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ ∃h (ψ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
           π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
        ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
             π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
        ∧ φ
          [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
           [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
              π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
tm (X ×h A) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
     ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
     ∧ φ
       [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
           π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (X ×h A), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
tm (X ×h A) A
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
     ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
     ∧ φ
       [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
           π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (X ×h A), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₁
⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
    ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))]

ψ₁
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)),
 π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =

  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ~
π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ))
⊢ φ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))]

                 exact (prop_from_formula_to_partial_setoid φ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

X: partial_setoid H

  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =

  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
(partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
   (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ))
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)),
 π₂ (tm_var (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

X: partial_setoid H

  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
(∃h (ψ₂
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
        ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩] ⊢ ψ₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
∃h (ψ₂
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
      ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
           π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
      ∧ φ
        [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
            π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]) ⊢ ψ₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
(∃h (ψ₂
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
       ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
            π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
       ∧ φ
         [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
             π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ ψ₂
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
    ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
    ∧ φ
      [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₂
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
  ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
  ∧ φ
    [((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
ψ₂
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H

  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
(ψ₂
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))
   ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))))
∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) X
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ∧ a ≡ a'
⊢ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ∧ a ≡ a'
⊢ ψ₂
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]

tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) (X ×h A)

φ: form A

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ∧ a ≡ a' ⊢ ?t₁ ≡ ⟨ x, a' ⟩

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) (X ×h A)
 exact ⟨ x , a ⟩.

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ∧ a ≡ a' ⊢ ⟨ x, a ⟩ ≡ ⟨ x, a' ⟩

a ≡ a' ⊢ ⟨ x, a ⟩ ≡ ⟨ x, a' ⟩

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a ≡ a' ⊢ x ≡ x

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) X
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a ≡ a' ⊢ x ≡ x
 apply hyperdoctrine_refl.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)

a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a ≡ a' ⊢ a ≡ a'
 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H

partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) X
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ∧ a ≡ a' ⊢ ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X
  (formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) X
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
a':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))): tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) A
ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩] ⊢ ψ₂ [⟨ x, a ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
isMonic (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
isMonic (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧
p: ψ₁ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ =
ψ₂ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ
ψ₁ = ψ₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧
p: ψ₁ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ =
ψ₂ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ
ψ₁ ⊢ ψ₂

A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧

A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧
p: ψ₁ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ =
ψ₂ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)

      exact p.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧
p: ψ₁ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ =
ψ₂ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ
ψ₂ ⊢ ψ₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
φ: form A
X: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁, ψ₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X,
formula_to_partial_setoid φ ⟧
p: ψ₁ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ =
ψ₂ · formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)

      exact (!p).
  Qed.

  (** * 2. Proofs to commuting triangles *)

  (** * 2.1. The morphism from a proof *)
  Definition proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form
             {Γ₁ Γ₂ : ty H}
             {Δ : form Γ₁}
             {φ : form Γ₂}
             {s : tm Γ₁ Γ₂}
             (q : Δ ⊢ φ [ s ])
    : form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h formula_to_partial_setoid φ)
    := let x := π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂)) in
       let y := π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂)) in
       Δ [ x ] ∧ φ [ y ] ∧ y ≡ s [ x ]tm.

  Arguments proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form {Γ₁ Γ₂ Δ φ s} q /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form q)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form q)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
           ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
             ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))
               ≡ s [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂)) ]tm)
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (Δ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
            ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))
              ≡ s [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))
                ]tm
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (Δ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
            ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))
              ≡ s [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))
                ]tm
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (Δ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
            ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))
              ≡ s [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))
                ]tm
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
⊤ ⊢ ∀h (∀h (Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
⊢ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⇒ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
∧ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ x ≡ x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ Δ [x]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ x ≡ x
 apply hyperdoctrine_refl.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ Δ [x]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
Δ [x] ⊢ Δ [x]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))]
∧ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y] ∧ y ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

                      ∧ φ
                        [π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁)
                                   ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))]
                        ∧ π₂
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁)
                                    ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))
                          ≡ s
                            [π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (π₁
                                        (tm_var
                                           (((...
                                              ×h Γ₁)
                                             ×h Γ₂)
                                            ×h Γ₂)))))
                            ]tm
                      ⇒ Δ
                        [π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁)
                                      ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))]
                        ∧ φ
                          [π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁)
                                  ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))]
                          ∧ π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁)
                                   ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))
                            ≡ s
                              [π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁)
                                             ×h Γ₁)
                                            ×h Γ₂)
                                           ×h Γ₂))))
                              ]tm))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
                    ⇒ Δ [x₁] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x₁ ]tm
                      ⇒ Δ [x₂]
                        ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ Δ [x₁] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x₁ ]tm
      ⇒ Δ [x₂] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))]
∧ x₁ ~ x₂
⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
  ⇒ Δ [x₁] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x₁ ]tm
    ⇒ Δ [x₂] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

    ⇒ Δ [x₂] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ Δ [x₁] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x₁ ]tm
⊢ Δ [x₂] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂

⊢ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H

x₁:= π₂

⊢ Δ [x₂]

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂
 exact (eq_from_formula_to_partial_setoid _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

  (π₁

x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ Δ [x₁]
 exact (prop_from_formula_to_partial_setoid _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂

        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

⊢ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x₂ ]tm

        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

⊢ y₂ ≡ ?t₂

        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ Δ [x₁] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x₁ ]tm
⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ≡ x₂

                 exact (eq_from_formula_to_partial_setoid _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form q)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
               ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
                 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))
                   ≡ s [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂)) ]tm)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
                 ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))]
                   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂))
                     ≡ s [π₁ (tm_var (Γ₁ ×h Γ₂)) ]tm)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x ]tm
              ⇒ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x ]tm
                ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Γ₁, Γ₂: ty H
Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ₁))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))]
⊢ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x ]tm
  ⇒ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x ]tm ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂

s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂
(Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x ]tm)
∧ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ y₁ ≡ ?t₂

Δ: form Γ₁
φ: form Γ₂
s: tm Γ₁ Γ₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [s]
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₂

(Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₁] ∧ y₁ ≡ s [x ]tm)
∧ Δ [x] ∧ φ [y₂] ∧ y₂ ≡ s [x ]tm ⊢ ?t₂ ≡ y₂

x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Γ₁) ×h Γ₂) ×h Γ₂) Γ₁
