  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    t
    [π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))
    ]tm

A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)

Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~

∧ Δ
  [π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))))]
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    t
    [π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))))
    ]tm
⊢ Δ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))]

    ]tm

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
(γ₁ ~ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ Δ [γ₂] ∧ x₂ ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ~ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ Δ [γ₂] ∧ x₂ ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X

Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ~ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm ⊢ Δ'

Hφ: isMonic φ

∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ~ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm ⊢ Δ'

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Γ)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Γ))
  ∧ Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Γ))]) [⟨ γ₁, γ₂ ⟩]
 ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩]) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
  ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
  ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩] ⊢ γ₁ ≡ γ₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩] ⊢ Δ [γ₁]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
((γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩])
∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩] ⊢ γ₁ ≡ γ₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ⊢ γ₁ ≡ γ₂

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ Δ [γ₁]) ∧ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ x₁, x₂ ⟩]

∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ X [⟨ x₁, t [γ₁ ]tm ⟩] ⊢ Δ [γ₁]

Hφ: isMonic φ

∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~

  (π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ₂] ∧ x₂ ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ Δ [γ₂] ∧ x₂ ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm ⊢ Δ [γ₂]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ ?t₁ ≡ γ₂

Hφ: isMonic φ

t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]

  (π₁

Γ: ty H

  (π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ⊢ γ₁ ≡ γ₂

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ x₂ ~ ?y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)

  (π₁
     (π₁

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ ?y ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
 exact x₁.

Γ: ty H

t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ x₂ ~ x₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X

Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁

Γ: ty H

t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~

x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X

Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ x₁ ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X

        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm ⊢ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
              
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
(γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm
⊢ t [γ₁ ]tm ~ t [γ₂ ]tm

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
γ₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
γ₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) Γ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X) X
Δ':= (γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ Δ [γ₁] ∧ x₁ ~ t [γ₁ ]tm: form ((((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)
γ₁ ≡ γ₂ ⊢ γ₁ ≡ γ₂

                     apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
               ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
                 t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
                 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
                   t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
       t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))

∧ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]

  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))

(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H

Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t

(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)

   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
(Δ
 [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm]
 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ Δ
  [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
(Δ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))]
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
   t [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)))) ]tm)
∧ Δ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    t [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))))
    ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))

 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~

 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X) ×h X))) ~

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
      ⇒ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
             ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
               t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ⟩]))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
  ⇒ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
         ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
           t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
⊢ ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
      t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ), ?t ⟩]

p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t

∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
tm (𝟙 ×h Γ) X
 exact (t [ π₂ (tm_var _) ]tm).

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
⊢ Δ
  [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ), t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ⟩
    ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Γ) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ), t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ⟩
     ]tm]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
⊢ Δ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]
  ∧ t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ~
    t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
⊢ Δ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]
  ∧ t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ~
    t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm

π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))
⊢ Δ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]

p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
Δ [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
(t ~ t) [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ))]
⊢ t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ~
  t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm

              
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ t ~ t
ζ:= Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
  t [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm: form (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ ×h X)
t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ~
t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm
⊢ t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm ~
  t [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Γ)) ]tm

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      Qed.

 exact point_partial_setoid_morphism_laws.

    End MonicLemma.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
            π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))]

  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)))

          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))),

⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))

  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =

  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ

  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =

Δ
⊢ (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
Δ
⊢ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]
⊢ ((φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ x₁, a ⟩
    [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
     [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ x₂, a ⟩
      [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
       [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]) ∧ x₁ ~ x₁

point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ
p:= Hφ (formula_to_partial_setoid Δ)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) r₃: point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁ =
point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
(point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂)
[⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
   x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ

  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁)

point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂
(φ
 [⟨ x₁, a ⟩
  [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
   [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x₂, a ⟩
    [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
     [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~

  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₁ r₁) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (point_partial_setoid_morphism Δ x₂ r₂) φ

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
       x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
       ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
     ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
       ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
         x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
         ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
         ⟩])

         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
       ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]

       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
         ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
        x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
        ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]
∧ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
          x₂
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
          ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
        ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
          ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]

A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
   x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~

          ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var

        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
        ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
          ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]

X: partial_setoid H

 [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁

    x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁

           (tm_var

    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])

     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))

       [((π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))

                 (tm_var

                     ×h X))),

        [⟨ (π₁

               ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
          x₂
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
          ]tm)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                     ×h X))),
          π₂
            (tm_var

X: partial_setoid H

Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
 exact (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var _)))).

    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]

   [π₁
      (π₁

   ∧ π₂
       (π₁

   [π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]
   ∧ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))) ~
     (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
     ]tm)
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
     ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(Δ
 [π₁
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩])
 [π₁
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
a₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
((φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₃ ~ x₁)
∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, a₂ ⟩]

tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
 exact x₁.

((φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₃ ~ x₁)
∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X

Δ:= x₃ ~ x₁ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₃ ~ x₁
q₂: Δ
⊢ (a₂
   :
   tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
     (eq_partial_setoid A)) ~ a₂
x₃ ~ x₁ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a₂ ⟩]

a₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
Δ:= x₃ ~ x₁ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₃ ~ x₁
Δ ⊢ a₂ ~ a₂

   :

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
a₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
((φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₃ ~ x₁)
∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]

φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]

X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
       x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
       ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
     ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
       ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
         x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
         ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
         ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
        x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
        ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]
∧ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
          x₁
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
          ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
        ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
          ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]

A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
   x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
          x₁
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
          ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁

        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))
        ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
          ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

 [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
  ]tm]
 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    x₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((Δ
       [((π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                     ×h X))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
         ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
                  ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
               ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
          x₁
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
          ]tm)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                     ×h X))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                     ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
                 ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
         ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
            [π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
                   ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
                ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
a:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) A
Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X

    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])

           (tm_var

               ×h X)) ]tm,

        (tm_var
           ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))

       ]tm)

       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))

       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
          [π₁

                ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)

      [⟨ (π₁

       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))
       ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
 exact (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var _))))).

Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
(Δ
 [π₁
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ (Δ
   [π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))]
   ∧ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))) ~
     π₂
       (π₁

             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))))
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                      ×h X))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))
     ⟩]

 [π₁

 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ~

    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var

  π₂

       (π₁
          (π₁

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

φ

     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))),
 a

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) X

Δ:= φ [⟨ x₁, a ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a ⟩]: form (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
((φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)))) ⟩]

 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂

                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X

  (π₁

((φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a₂ ⟩]

x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
 exact x₂.

a₁:= π₂

⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, a₂ ⟩]

Δ:= x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₃ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ
⊢ (a₂
   :
   tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
     (eq_partial_setoid A)) ~ a₂
x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, a₂ ⟩]

Δ:= x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩]: form (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₃ ~ x₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
a₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
((φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₃, a₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
a₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                  ×h X)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
a₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) A
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, a₁ ⟩]

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
      ⇒ ∃h ((φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
              π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
  ⇒ ∃h ((φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(formula_to_partial_setoid
   (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
         ⟩])))
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
         ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H

Hφ: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid
     partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form) X

partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_form
 exact partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_laws.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl
     partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))

     partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))

       partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form)
    (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
∃h ((φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
               π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
         [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(∃h ((φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
        ∧ (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
          [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
        ∧ (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
          [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))))
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))
       ∧ ∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)
                             ×h X))))) ⟩]))
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
tm ((A ×h A) ×h X) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))))
           ⟩]))
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X), ?t ⟩]
