H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A))
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))))
           ⟩]))
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))))
   [⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X),
    π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm
   ≡ (π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))
     [⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X),
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A) ×h X)))))
          ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X),
             π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]))
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h A)))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X),
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]

 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)))
   ≡ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))))
          ⟩]))
  ∧ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
             π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
      ∧ (∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
              π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
        [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
           π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))]

Hφ: isMonic φ
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
         ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])

 π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
((π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
 ≡ (π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]))
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)),

         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

       π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X),
   π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
((π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))]
 ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm
   ≡ (π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h A)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm)
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
    π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X),
    π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X),
      π₂ (tm_var (((A ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]

    Qed.

    Definition partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_form
      : form (X ×h formula_to_partial_setoid partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form)
      := let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)) in
         let a := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) in
         φ [ ⟨ x , a ⟩ ].

    Arguments partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_form /.

  partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_form

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((φ
           [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
            π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))]

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)))

[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]

Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))) ~

[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                                 ×h A))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                              ×h A))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                             ×h A))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))
                    ⇒ (φ
                       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
                        π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h X)
                                          ×h X) ×h A)
                                        ×h A))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                                ×h A))) ⟩]
                      ⇒ (φ
                         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
                          π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h A) ×h A)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A)
                               ×h A)) ⟩]))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))))
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))
    ⇒ (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))
       ⟩]
      ⇒ (φ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]

A: ty H

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((φ
               [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
                π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (φ
                 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
                  π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁

                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))))

[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]

    ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))) ~

 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A))))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
       ]tm])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A) X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((φ
             [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)),
              π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
  ⇒ ∃h ((φ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩])

Hφ: isMonic φ

∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩])

Hφ: isMonic φ
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩

           [π₁

                  ×h A)) ]tm,
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h eq_partial_setoid A) ×h A))
         ⟩ ]tm ]tm])

       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,

X: partial_setoid H

Hφ: isMonic φ

∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))

       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩

        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h A)) ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
∃h ((φ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
               π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
         [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(∃h ((φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
        ∧ (∃h (φ
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
          [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
     ∧ (∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
             π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
   ∧ (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
           π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm
  ≡ (π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩ ]tm
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)), π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X))
         ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((A ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
         ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])

      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))))

 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))

[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))]

⊢ ∃h (φ

 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩]
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv
    (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
         ∧ (∃h (φ
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                 π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
           [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
          ∧ (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                  π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
            [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h A)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h A))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ≡ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))
          ∧ (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h X)),
                  π₁ (tm_var (A ×h X)) ⟩]))
            [π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))]

A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))
        ≡ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A))))
        ∧ ∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)))
               ⟩]))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A), ?t ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
tm ((X ×h A) ×h A) X
 exact (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var _))).
            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h A) ×h A) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A),
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]

               
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
X: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X (eq_partial_setoid A)
Hφ: isMonic φ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End EssentiallySurjective.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj
  partial_setoids_disp_functor

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj
  partial_setoids_disp_functor

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
∑ yy : hyperdoctrine_formula_disp_cat H A,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor A yy) f

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
hyperdoctrine_formula_disp_cat H A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
(λ yy : hyperdoctrine_formula_disp_cat H A,
 z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
   (partial_setoids_disp_functor A yy) f) ?pr1

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
hyperdoctrine_formula_disp_cat H A
 exact (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
(λ yy : hyperdoctrine_formula_disp_cat H A,
 z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
   (partial_setoids_disp_functor A yy) f)
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoids_disp_functor A
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)) -->[
identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)] f
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
f -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))] 
partial_setoids_disp_functor A
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
(?pr10 ;; ?pr1)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp f f)
  (pr2
     (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
  (id_disp f)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
(λ _ : (?pr10 ;; ?pr1)%mor_disp =
       transportb (mor_disp f f)
         (pr2
            (identity_z_iso
               (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
         (id_disp f),
 (?pr1 ;; ?pr10)%mor_disp =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f)))
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f))))
   (pr1
      (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
   (id_disp
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f))))) ?pr11

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoids_disp_functor A
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)) -->[
identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)] f
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
  (pr11 f)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ?Goal (pr21 f) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
  (pr11 f)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
isMonic (pr21 f)

          exact (pr2 f).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor (pr21 f)
     (pr2 f)) (pr21 f) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))
 apply partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_comm.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
f -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))] 
partial_setoids_disp_functor A
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_morphism (pr11 f)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ?Goal
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f))) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism (pr21 f)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_morphism (pr11 f)
  (formula_to_partial_setoid
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f)))
 apply partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f))
  (formula_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form (pr21 f))) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism (pr21 f)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism (eq_partial_setoid A))
 apply partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_comm.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
((((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f)
    :
    category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
    pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
            (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
               (pr21 f))) ⟧),,
   (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_comm (pr21 f)
    :
    (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
            pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                    (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                       (pr21 f))) ⟧,
     ff
     · pr21 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
               (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                  (pr21 f))) =
     pr21 f
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso
            (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f)
       :
       category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
       pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
               (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                  (pr21 f))) ⟧))),, tt) ;; (((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor
                                                (pr21 f)
                                                (pr2 f)
                                              :
                                              category_of_partial_setoids
                                                H
                                              ⟦ pr11 
                                              (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                                                 A
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                                                 (pr21 f))),
                                              pr11 f ⟧),,
                                             (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_comm
                                                (pr21 f)
                                                (pr2 f)
                                              :
                                              (λ ff : 
                                                 category_of_partial_setoids
                                                 H
                                                 ⟦ pr11 
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                                                 A
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                                                 (pr21 f))),
                                                 pr11 f
                                                 ⟧,
                                               ff
                                               · pr21 f =
                                               pr21 
                                               (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                                                 A
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                                                 (pr21 f)))
                                               · identity_z_iso
                                                 (functor_to_partial_setoids
                                                 H A))
                                                (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor
                                                 (pr21 f)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 f)
                                                 :
                                                 category_of_partial_setoids
                                                 H
                                                 ⟦ pr11 
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                                                 A
                                                 (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                                                 (pr21 f))),
                                                 pr11 f
                                                 ⟧))),,
                                            tt))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp f f)
  (pr2
     (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
  (id_disp f)
 apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A: ty H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
(λ _ : ((((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv
             (pr21 f)
           :
           category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
           pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                   (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                      (pr21 f))) ⟧),,
          (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_comm
             (pr21 f)
           :
           (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
                   ⟦ pr11 f,
                   pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                           A
                           (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                              (pr21 f))) ⟧,
            ff
            · pr21 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                      (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                         (pr21 f))) =
            pr21 f
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (identity_z_iso
                   (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
             (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv
                (pr21 f)
              :
              category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
              pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                      (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                         (pr21 f))) ⟧))),, tt) ;; 
        (((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor
             (pr21 f) (pr2 f)
           :
           category_of_partial_setoids H
           ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                        (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧),,
          (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_comm
             (pr21 f) (pr2 f)
           :
           (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
                   ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor
                             A
                             (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                                (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧,
            ff · pr21 f =
            pr21 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                    (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                       (pr21 f)))
            · identity_z_iso
                (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
             (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor
                (pr21 f) (pr2 f)
              :
              category_of_partial_setoids H
              ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                        (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                           (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧))),,
         tt))%mor_disp =
       transportb (mor_disp f f)
         (pr2
            (identity_z_iso
               (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
         (id_disp f),
 ((((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor (pr21 f)
       (pr2 f)
     :
     category_of_partial_setoids H
     ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
               (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                  (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧),,
    (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_comm
       (pr21 f) (pr2 f)
     :
     (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
             ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                       (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                          (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧,
      ff · pr21 f =
      pr21 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
              (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                 (pr21 f)))
      · identity_z_iso
          (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
       (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor (pr21 f)
          (pr2 f)
        :
        category_of_partial_setoids H
        ⟦ pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                  (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                     (pr21 f))), pr11 f ⟧))),, tt) ;; 
  (((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f)
     :
     category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
     pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
             (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                (pr21 f))) ⟧),,
    (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_comm
       (pr21 f)
     :
     (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
             pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                     (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                        (pr21 f))) ⟧,
      ff
      · pr21 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                   (pr21 f))) =
      pr21 f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso
             (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
       (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f)
        :
        category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ pr11 f,
        pr11 (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
                (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
                   (pr21 f))) ⟧))),, tt))%mor_disp =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f)))
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f))))
   (pr1
      (identity_z_iso (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
   (id_disp
      (partial_setoids_disp_functor A
         (partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form
            (pr21 f)))))
  (let X :=
     λ (C : category) (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
     (xx : disp_mono_codomain C x)
     (yy : disp_mono_codomain C y)
     (x0 x' : xx -->[ f] yy),
     pr1
       (locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat C x y
          f xx yy x0 x') in
   X (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
     (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso
           (functor_to_partial_setoids H A))
      · identity_z_iso
          (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)) f f
     (((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv (pr21 f),,
        partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_comm
          (pr21 f)),, tt) ;; ((partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor
                                 (pr21 f) (pr2 f),,
                               partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_comm
                                 (pr21 f) (pr2 f)),,
                              tt))%mor_disp
     (transportb (mor_disp f f)
        (pr2
           (identity_z_iso
              (functor_to_partial_setoids H A)))
        (id_disp f)))
 apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat.
  Defined.
End FormulaFunctor.

(** * 6. Identifying terms using monomorphisms *)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
Δ ⊢ y ~ y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
Δ ⊢ y ~ y

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

y: tm Γ Y

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

    exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

X, Y: partial_setoid H

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
       x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
         x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
(∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
        x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
          x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
          x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

y: tm Γ Y

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
          x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
          x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)

       ∧ φ

(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
        ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~

b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
       x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X

    exact (x₂ [ c ]tm).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
       x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), x₂ [c ]tm ⟩]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ
 [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
    x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (Δ
   [((π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), x₂ [c ]tm ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
      x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), x₂ [c ]tm ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), x₂ [c ]tm ⟩ ]tm ]tm]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
   x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm)
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))]
   ∧ x₂ [c ]tm ~
     x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm)
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ x₂ [c ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ (Δ [c] ∧ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm)
  ∧ φ [⟨ x₂ [c ]tm, b ⟩]

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ Δ [c]

⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

Δ [c] ⊢ Δ [c]

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(x₂ ~ x₂) [c] ⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm ⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

X, Y: partial_setoid H

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ ?x₁ ~ x₂ [c ]tm
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ ?y₁ ~ b
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
 exact (x₂ [ c ]tm).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
 exact (y [ c ]tm).

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y

Δ [c] ⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(x₂ ~ x₂) [c] ⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm ⊢ x₂ [c ]tm ~ x₂ [c ]tm

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ y [c ]tm ~ b

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
 exact a.

r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
 exact (x₁ [ c ]tm).

Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
 exact (y [ c ]tm).

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ x₁ [c ]tm ~ a

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂

(Δ [c] ∧ a ~ x₁ [c ]tm) ∧ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x₁ [c ]tm, y [c ]tm ⟩]

           apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
(φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]) [c] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂ [c ]tm, y [c ]tm ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
c:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
φ [⟨ x₂ [c ]tm, y [c ]tm ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x₂ [c ]tm, y [c ]tm ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
Qed.

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

 apply (partial_setoid_mono_eq_lem φ Hφ p₂ p₁).

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
Δ
⊢ (Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
Δ
⊢ Δ [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~
     x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
Δ ⊢ Δ ∧ x₁ ~ x₁

Γ: ty H

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y

Δ ⊢ ?Goal

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
fx₂ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
(point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂)
[⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
[⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
Δ [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
Δ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Hφ: isMonic φ
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
r₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
r₂: Δ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₂
r₃: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
fx₁:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₁ r₁: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
fx₂:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ x₂ r₂: partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) X
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₁ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism fx₂ φ
s: Δ ⊢ fx₁ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
Qed.

Arguments formula_to_per_form {H A} φ /.
Arguments formula_to_partial_setoid_incl_form {H A} φ /.
Arguments proof_to_partial_setoid_morphism_form {H Γ₁ Γ₂ Δ φ s} q /.
Arguments partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_form {H A X} φ /.
Arguments partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_mor_form {H A X} φ /.
Arguments partial_setoids_disp_functor_eso_inv_form {H A X} φ /.
